author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Write a bounded research note aligning BDC quaternary logic with a Belnap-style four-valued frame and define what this alignment means for reboot-line semantics.
research_question: Can BDC formalize its quaternary states with a Belnap-style semantics without overstating the equivalence or rewriting qcore prematurely?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the scientific import plan is approved.

tests_required: alignment note includes mapping and limits
alignment note states designated action/evidence implications
out_of_scope: claiming BDC is already fully Belnap-complete
